message:
data(web): update phage database with expanded genome collection

Database update:
- Size increased from 3.0 MB to 5.8 MB
- Contains expanded phage genome collection
- Updated hash for cache invalidation

Manifest changes:
- hash: 8c13fe1fa78cb1f177b845ec73354a44f6ef5679...
- size: 6029312 bytes (5.8 MB)
- generatedAt: 2025-12-31T11:30:40.378Z

The database includes additional phage genomes for broader
analysis coverage. The stale cache detection in DatabaseLoader
will prompt users with cached copies to refresh.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
